name: @tootallnate/ffmpeg-wasm
description: Base FFmpeg WebAssembly runtime with a dynamic-extension model: ship `ffmpeg.wasm` with libav* core but no codecs, then load per-codec WASM `.so` extensions (bink1, bink2, etc.) at runtime via WebAssembly dynamic linking. Mirrors the quickjs-wasi extension architecture for FFmpeg.

scripts.build: if [ -x /tmp/wasi-sdk/bin/clang ]; then make; fi && tsc && cp src/ffmpeg.wasm dist/ffmpeg.wasm

author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
